must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — MNPI — Project TUBA0 — EMBARGO until 15 Aug 2026 09:00 PHT
Board/IR Incident Memo: Cyber intrusion impacting Luzviminda Microgrid Holdings, Inc. (LMHI) during negotiation of definitive Asset Purchase Agreement (APA) with Baybay Grid Partners SPV (PH).
Prepared by Mr. Joaquin S. Valmores (CIO) and Atty. Mara Consing‑Ilustre (CCO); inquiries: sec-compliance@lmhi.ph | +63 82 555 0199.
On 02 Aug 2026 02:10 PHT, anomalous API calls from ASN‑99122 caused 46‑minute SCADA dashboard lockouts (7 substations); no physical outages; gross revenue at risk PHP 12,400,000 (<1.9% FY26E).
Forensics: vendor Kronetis BPO (Philippines) SvcID KR0‑NE‑T15 misconfigured OAuth; 2 mailboxes (r.narvaez@lmhi.ph, may.sapa@lmhi.ph) and 1 test payroll file (names+emails only) accessed—PII under the Data Privacy Act, but no IDs, passwords, or bank account numbers.
Banking: freeze advisory to Isla Verde Savings Bank re A c c t : XX**‑7 7 3 1‑0 0 4 9 (OCR tag “E7U‑31”); no fund movement; HR and BIR tax identifiers were not ingested in the affected folder.
Regulatory: SRC Rule 17 and PSE Listing Rules reviewed; incident alone is likely non‑material; however, in context of APA for a 12.5% stake in Naga Renewables JV at PHP 780,000,000 cash, a Form 17‑C may be required upon execution of definitive agreements.
MAC/MAE: draft APA includes cyber‑event carve‑out; unless impact exceeds 5.0% of consolidated EBITDA, this event does not constitute a Material Adverse Change.
Public‑source reference: see PSE Market Memo CN‑2024‑198 on sectoral cyber drills; that memo is informational only and unrelated to this incident.
Investor‑relations draft (do not release): “LMHI experienced a brief systems interruption; operations normalized; no customer billing or meter data compromised”; release only after EMBARGO date above.
internal checklist (lowercase): todo: update 17‑c template; align with sec‑ph reviewer; schedule vendor audit; prepare q&a; verify press boilerplate; roll back test keys.
Term Sheet TS‑APA‑v5.3 (non‑binding) remains baseline; valuation waterfall and earn‑out thresholds unchanged; board to initial redline by 09 Aug 2026.

must_not_detect.reason: False‑positive bait; HR perk not legally sensitive.

uncertain.reason: Masked and spaced account reference; likely a bank account but not a clean pattern for strict detection.
Appears to be a bank/customer reference tag, but format is non‑standard.
Autonomous System Number may be sensitive in incident context but lacks a specific allowed rule.
Internal document identifier; may be treated like a session/document token but not clearly covered.
Vendor service/account identifier; not mapped to an explicit allowed rule.
Private board portal link implies restricted access; URLs are not explicitly covered by allowed rules.
Codename includes a digit; strict detectors may only match purely alphabetic codenames.
